jobs.title: Education Team Intern
jobs.location: Foster City, CA (Hybrid) In office M,W,F
jobs.content_text:
Replit is the agentic software creation platform that enables anyone to build applications using natural language. With millions of users worldwide, Replit is democratizing software development by removing traditional barriers to application creation.


As an Education Team Intern, you’ll play a hands-on role in growing Replit’s presence across top university campuses in the United States. You’ll help design, launch, and scale programs that empower students to build software with Replit — from hackathons and workshops to campus ambassador initiatives and partnership activations.

You’ll work closely with the Community Program Lead and cross-functional partners in Marketing, Product, and Partnerships to drive engagement at target schools and turn students into passionate Replit builders and advocates.

This internship is ideal for someone who is deeply embedded in the college tech ecosystem, has strong project management instincts, and is excited about the future of AI-powered software creation.


What You’ll Achieve

  • Campus Activation Strategy: Help design and execute a campus activation playbook targeting Top 25 Engineering and Top 25 Business programs (grad and undergrad) across the U.S. Identify the right student orgs, CS clubs, entrepreneurship centers, and innovation labs to partner with.

  • Campus Leader Program Support: Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and enabling a cohort of Campus Leaders — student ambassadors who run Replit workshops, demo days, and hack sessions at their schools.

  • Event Programming: Plan and coordinate virtual and in-person events (workshops, webinars, build-a-thons) that teach students how to vibe code and ship projects on Replit. Own run-of-show documents, speaker coordination, and post-event follow-ups.

  • Content & Enablement: Create playbooks, one-pagers, social media toolkits, and presentation templates that Campus Leaders and student partners can use to promote Replit on campus.

  • Community Engagement: Monitor and engage with student communities on Discord, Slack, and social media. Surface feedback, feature requests, and success stories to the internal team.

  • Metrics & Reporting: Track program KPIs (event attendance, signups, projects shipped, referral conversions) and prepare weekly dashboards to share with the Education team and leadership.


Skills You’ll Need to Bring

  • Currently enrolled in (or recently graduated from) a Top 25 U.S. Engineering or Business program (undergrad or graduate)

  • Strong written and verbal communication skills with the ability to create compelling content and build relationships across diverse student communities

  • Experience organizing campus events, hackathons, or student org programming

  • Self-motivated with excellent project management skills; able to juggle multiple initiatives and deadlines simultaneously

  • Familiarity with community platforms (Discord, Slack) and productivity tools (Notion, Airtable, Google Workspace)

  • Comfort working cross-functionally with marketing, product, and partnerships stakeholders

  • Genuine enthusiasm for developer tools, AI, and the future of software creation


Nice to Haves

  • Hands-on experience with Replit (personal projects, coursework, or hackathons)

  • Experience managing online communities or ambassador/fellowship programs

  • Familiarity with community health metrics (engagement rates, NPS, activation funnels)

  • Prior internship experience in tech, edtech, or developer relations

  • A personal network across multiple target campuses (student orgs, Greek life, entrepreneurship clubs, CS departments)


This is a full-time role that can be held from our Foster City, CA office. The role has an in-office requirement of Monday, Wednesday, and Friday.

Full-Time Employee Benefits Include:

💰 Competitive Salary & Equity

💹 401(k) Program with a 4% match

⚕️ Health, Dental, Vision and Life Insurance

🩼 Short Term and Long Term Disability

🚼 Paid Parental, Medical, Caregiver Leave

🚗 Commuter Benefits

📱 Monthly Wellness Stipend

🧑‍💻 Autonomous Work Environment

🖥 In Office Set-Up Reimbursement

🏝 Flexible Time Off (FTO) + Holidays

🚀 Quarterly Team Gatherings

☕ In Office Amenities

Want to learn more about what we are up to?

  • Meet the Replit Agent

  • Replit: Make an app for that

  • Replit Blog

  • Amjad TED Talk

Interviewing + Culture at Replit

  • Operating Principles

  • Reasons not to work at Replit

To achieve our mission of making programming more accessible around the world, we need our team to be representative of the world. We welcome your unique perspective and experiences in shaping this product. We encourage people from all kinds of backgrounds to apply, including and especially candidates from underrepresented and non-traditional backgrounds.
